accordion_modal_show_border_under_title_: Show Border under Title of Opened Section
add_to_cart_button_modal_change_the_appe: Change the appearance of this button in "Customize" → "WooCommerce" → "Buttons".
add_to_cart_button_modal_if_your_product: If your product has variations, this will only show a "Select Options" button that leads to the product page, instead of a "Add to Cart" button.
add_to_cart_button_modal_variable_produc: – Variable product (will only show "Select Options" button)
apl_order_section_custom_order_in_automa: Custom order in automatically generated phone layout
bg_video_modal_using_your_custom_icon_se: Using your custom icon set in "Lay Options" - "Video" Section
border_radius_section_use_one_radius_for: Use one radius for all corners
carousel_modal_phone_breakpoint_only_exa:
Phone breakpoint only. Examples for valid values:
"200px", "100vh", "100svh", "100vh - 50px", "100svh - 50px", "auto"
classes_html_id_modal_html_classes_and_i: HTML classes and ids can't contain special characters and can't start with a number. An id needs to be unique on its page. You can assign multiple classes separated by spaces but you can only assign one id.
context_menu_row_use_browser_height_for_: Use Browser Height for Row Height
create_phone_layout_modal_does_not_copy_: Does not copy empty rows, vertical lines, row backgrounds.
create_phone_layout_modal_stack_elements: Stack elements on top of each other
custom_row_height_modal_valid_units_px_v: Valid units: px, vh, vw, svh, lvh
custom_row_height_modal_vh_is_viewport_h: "vh" is viewport height. For example 100vh is 100% of the browser height.
delete_phone_layout_modal_you_ll_just_ha: You'll just have the standard phone layout then.
element_grid_modal_add_elements_using_th: Add Elements using the buttons on the top left.
element_grid_modal_amount_of_rows_to_sho: Amount of rows to show (0 = show all)
"Amount of rows to show" must be larger than 0.
embed_modal_error_no_embed_found_for_thi: Error, no embed found for this URL.
expand_row_modal_choose_rows_that_should: Choose rows that should expand/collapse on click.
expand_row_modal_image_position_for_show: Image Position for show on hover
Image Position for show on scroll
expand_row_modal_in_the_gridder_on_each_: In the Gridder, on each row there is a number, so you know which number to expand/collapse here.
expand_row_modal_position_chosen_in_lay_: Position chosen in Lay Options → Imagehover Addon → Image Position for show on hover
Position chosen in Lay Options → Imagehover Addon → Image Position for show on scroll
expand_row_modal_show_image_on_chosen_in: Show Image on chosen in Lay Options → Imagehover Addon → Show Image on
expand_row_modal_show_image_on_scroll_an: Show image on scroll and hover
expand_row_modal_show_image_on_scroll_fo: Show image on scroll for touch devices and on hover for desktop
expand_row_modal_to_collapse_a_row_right: To collapse a row, right-click it and choose "Collapse Row".
grabber_implementation_of_element_not_fo: Implementation of element not found. Need to enable CMB2 or a custom element plugin?
gridder_css_modal_custom_css_for_this_pa: Custom CSS for this page. Changes are saved when you click
gridder_css_modal_your_css_below_is_inse: Your CSS below is inserted into the media query for the desktop version:
Your CSS below is inserted into the media query for the mobile version:
html5video_modal_autoplaying_videos_must: Autoplaying videos must be muted. If you need sound for your autoplaying video, check "Show Unmute/Mute Button".
html5video_modal_in_a_carousel_a_html5_v: In a Carousel a HTML5 video will always autoplay. If you need sound for your video, check "Show Unmute/Mute Button".
html5video_modal_using_your_custom_icon_: Using your custom icon set in "Lay Options" - "Video" Section
html5video_modal_videos_in_marquees_will: Videos in marquees will always autoplay, loop and are muted.
indicator_forced_browser_height_because_: Forced Browser Height because Cover Feature is active
link_modal_image_position_for_show_on_ho: Image Position for show on hover
link_modal_image_position_for_show_on_sc: Image Position for show on scroll
link_modal_open_link_in_a_new_tab: Open link in a new tab
link_modal_position_chosen_in_lay_option: Position chosen in Lay Options → Imagehover Addon → Image Position for show on hover
Position chosen in Lay Options → Imagehover Addon → Image Position for show on scroll
link_modal_show_image_on_chosen_in_lay_o: Show Image on chosen in Lay Options → Imagehover Addon → Show Image on
link_modal_show_image_on_scroll_and_hove: Show image on scroll and hover
link_modal_show_image_on_scroll_for_touc: Show image on scroll for touch devices and on hover for desktop
link_modal_style_text_links_info: Style Text Links in Customize → Links in Texts
marquee_modal_add_elements_using_the_but: Add Elements using the buttons on the top left.
marquee_modal_the_separator_character_us: The separator character uses the "Textformat" setting above as its font and font size
marquee_modal_your_text_must_be_unstyled: Your text must be unstyled for this to work. In the Texteditor select your text and click "Clear formatting" (eraser button)
news_modal_amount_of_news_to_show_0_off: Amount of news to show (0 = off)
news_modal_amount_of_news_to_show_must_b: "Amount of news to show" must be set above and can't be 0.
product_index_modal_active_background_co: Active Background Color (A product is active means you are on its product-page currently)
products_grid_modal_amount_of_rows_to_sh: Amount of rows to show (0 = show all)
"Amount of rows to show" must be larger than 0.
products_grid_modal_customize_the_appear: Customize the appearance of the Category Filter in "Customize" → "WooCommerce" → "Product Thumbnail Grid Category Filter".
Customize the appearance of the Tag Filter in "Customize" → "WooCommerce" → "Product Thumbnail Grid Tag Filter".
products_grid_modal_for_custom_order_cho: For custom order choose "Menu Order" and in "Products", click
products_grid_modal_leave_empty_to_show_: (leave empty to show all) (setting wont be used if "Show Category Filter" is enabled)
(leave empty to show all) (setting wont be used if "Show Tag Filter" is enabled)
products_grid_modal_limit_of_products_to: Limit of products to be shown (-1 is unlimited)
products_grid_modal_move_clicked_on_tag_: Move clicked on tag to first position
products_grid_modal_show_clear_all_butto: Show "Clear All" button when a tag was selected
products_grid_modal_shows_a_number_to_th: Shows a number to the right of each Category Filter, indicating how many Products are in that Category.
products_grid_modal_when_selecting_multi: When selecting multiple Tags, show Products with "Tag OR Tag" or "Tag AND Tag"? Please note if "AND" is selected, when clicking a Tag Bubble, other Tag Bubbles become hidden that would not produce a result in combination with the selected Tag Bubble.
project_index_modal_active_background_co: Active Background Color (A project is active means you are on its project-page currently)
row_same_height_text_elements_section_al: All text elements in this row stretch to the height of the tallest one.
row_same_height_text_elements_section_ma: Matching direct elements in this row stretch to the height of the tallest one.
scroll_animation_section_a_preset_with_t: A preset with this name already exists — saving will overwrite it.
scroll_animation_section_cannot_save_val: Cannot save — values are mixed across the selection. Pick a single element first.
scroll_animation_section_help_at_what_sc: Help: at what scroll position the animation triggers.
scroll_animation_section_help_how_the_an: Help: how the animation length value controls when the scroll animation completes.
scroll_animation_section_help_how_the_re: Help: how the reveal direction clips the element.
scroll_animation_section_help_when_on_th: Help: when on, the animation completes only when the element has fully scrolled past.
scroll_animation_section_save_current_se: Save current settings as a new preset
scroll_animation_section_smooth_scroll_t: For smoother scroll animations, especially with mouse wheels or on Windows, enable "Smooth Scroll" in Lay Options.
social_media_icons_modal_drag_and_drop_a: Drag and drop an icon to the right 👍🏻
sticky_modal_a_sticky_element_only_stays: A sticky element only stays stuck within its row.
sticky_modal_put_multiple_elements_insid: Put multiple elements inside the stack to create a larger row.
sticky_modal_to_make_this_work_you_can_p: To make this work you can place a stack element (+More → +Stack) next to the sticky element.
sticky_modal_when_using_horizontal_grid_: When using horizontal grid in combination with sticky, your element will not be positioned based on the horizontal grid. You can however use the normal alignment buttons
sticky_section_elements_are_sticky_only_: Elements are sticky only in their row. Use the stack/group element to put longer content next to the sticky element in the same row.
template_modal_replace_current_layout_wi: Replace current layout with page template
text_animation_section_attempt_letters_t: attempt letters to not get cut off
text_animation_section_help_at_what_scro: Help: at what scroll position the animation triggers.
text_animation_section_help_how_the_anim: Help: how the animation length value controls when the text animation completes.
text_animation_section_help_text_animati: Help: text animation, line breaks, plain text vs links or buttons, and site language for hyphenation.
text_animation_section_help_when_on_the_: Help: when on, the animation completes only when the element has fully scrolled past.
text_footer_modal_your_text_must_be_unst: Your text must be unstyled for this to work. In the Texteditor select your text and click "Clear formatting" (eraser button)
text_on_element_section_vertical_offset_: Vertical Offset for Left Center, Center Center & Right Center
Vertical Offset for Left Center, Center Center & Right Center (Phone)
text_on_slide_spacing_fields_vertical_of: Vertical Offset for Left Center, Center Center & Right Center
Vertical Offset for Left Center, Center Center & Right Center (Phone)
text_px_modal_the_values_are_based_on_th: (The % values are based on the width of the text element, not the layout width.)
text_width_section_the_values_are_based_: (The % values are based on the width of the text element, not the layout width.)
thumbnail_grid_modal_amount_of_rows_to_s: Amount of rows to show (0 = show all)
"Amount of rows to show" must be larger than 0.
thumbnail_grid_modal_customize_the_appea: Customize the appearance of the Category Filter in "Customize" → "Project Thumbnails" → "Thumbnail Grid Category Filter".
Customize the appearance of the Tag Filter in "Customize" → "Project Thumbnails" → "Thumbnail Grid Tag Filter".
thumbnail_grid_modal_limit_of_thumbnails: Limit of thumbnails to be shown
thumbnail_grid_modal_make_only_one_tag_s: Make only one Tag selectable at the same time
thumbnail_grid_modal_move_clicked_on_tag: Move clicked on tag to first position
thumbnail_grid_modal_only_show_project_t: Only show Project Thumbnails of visible Tag Filters (show/hide tag filters below)
thumbnail_grid_modal_show_clear_all_butt: Show "Clear All" button when a tag was selected
thumbnail_grid_modal_this_category_conta: This category contains no projects. Select a different Category in "Show Projects of Category"!
thumbnail_grid_modal_when_selecting_mult: When selecting multiple Tags, show Projects with "Tag OR Tag" or "Tag AND Tag"? Please note if "AND" is selected, when clicking a Tag Bubble, other Tag Bubbles become hidden that would not produce a result in combination with the selected Tag Bubble.
youtube_vimeo_video_modal_please_check_i: Please check if this is a valid YouTube or Vimeo address.
youtube_vimeo_video_modal_please_note_vo: Please note volume controls will only be available on Firefox due to technical limitations of other browsers.
youtube_vimeo_video_modal_show_share_but: Show share button for Lay Custom Controls
youtube_vimeo_video_modal_some_of_these_: Some of these settings are only available with a paid Vimeo plan.
